titles.fyp_title: Exploring the impact of sexual harassment on mental health
titles.fyp_description: Education is a fundamental driver of societal progress, economic development, and personal empowerment. However, in East Africa, access to quality education remains a significant challenge due to socio-economic disparities, inadequate infrastructure, and linguistic issues. This project proposes a mobile platform designed to overcome these challenges by integrating offline capabilities, multilingual features, gamified modules, and more to promote inclusive and equitable education for all.

existing_titles.title: Machine Learning in User Interface Design
existing_titles.description: This project explores the integration of machine learning algorithms to enhance user interface design and user experience. The research focuses on adaptive interfaces that learn from user behavior to provide personalized experiences.

existing_titles.title: AI-Powered Chatbot for Mental Health Support
existing_titles.description: Developing an intelligent chatbot using natural language processing to provide mental health support and resources to university students.

existing_titles.title: Blockchain for Secure Academic Credentials
existing_titles.description: Implementing blockchain technology to create tamper-proof digital certificates and academic credentials verification system.

existing_titles.title: IoT-Based Smart Agriculture Monitoring System
existing_titles.description: Design and development of an IoT system for monitoring soil conditions, weather data, and crop health to optimize farming practices.
